title: イクノ式万全メソッド

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I spot Ikuno Dictus looking around the track by
herself.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
If the starting gate is here, and the audience will
be over there... Hm...

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
I've been tasked with organizing the scrimmage
for this year's orientation, so I'm doing some
preliminary inspections for it.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
Apologies, but could you please move from that
area? I need to measure the track's width.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
Yes, I assume that is why I was entrusted with this
duty.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text: Orientations are not the time to cut any corners.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text: I still have much to do, so if you'll excuse me...
choice_data_list: You're going to do this all by yourself?

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
Yes. I alone was given this task. Once I have a lay
of the situation, the rest of my work should be
easy.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Despite her confident claim, it still seems like a
lot of work for one person. I'm about to offer to
help, when...

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
Oh, come on, Ikuno! Are you seriously trying to
do everything by yourself again?

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text:
Didn't we tell you to let us know if you needed
help?

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text: But I'm the one who was entrusted with this—

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, yeah. But three heads are better than one,
and we'll finish quicker too!

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
Very well. Then can you two start taking these
flags and...

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
Ah... My apologies. I have to instruct them on
what to do, so I must take my leave.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
I'd like to get a good idea of the audience's view
from the bleachers, so please stand in the front
and back corners and wave your flags. After
that...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Ikuno Dictus seems to be very well-liked by her
friends. It appears my services aren't needed after
all.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text: Yes, of course. There's never a reason not to be.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
The general public will also be present during the
orientation.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
And in the audience will surely be Umamusume
who will one day be among our members.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
I want those future Tracen students to have a
relaxing and enjoyable experience here.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text: But that is not the only reason.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
If we consider that this orientation is a local event
meant for the whole community to enjoy, it's
imperative to design it to be accessible to all...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I learn a lot about how much goes into making
such an event fun... as well as how passionate
Ikuno Dictus is about this orientation.
